sections.name: Hero
sections.description: Large centered hero with headline, subtitle, optional badge linking to /changelog, primary and secondary CTA buttons, and a decorative GitHub contribution-style SVG grid background. Title appends version number to the badge automatically.

title.description: Main headline text rendered as h1

subtitle.description: Supporting text rendered as paragraph; supports HTML via set:html

badge.description: When provided, shows a pill badge linking to /changelog. The badge text is split: left side shows the hardcoded version 'v3.0.0', right side shows this prop value

primaryCta.description: Primary button with shine hover effect, shadow-primary/30, and scale-105 on hover

sections.notes: Min height 70vh. The badge prop value is displayed on the right of the badge pill; the left label is hardcoded to 'v3.0.0' in source. Update that hardcoded string when bumping version.

sections.name: Features
sections.description: Feature grid section with icon cards displayed in a bordered, shadowed grid (bg-border gap-px overflow-hidden). Each card shows an SVG icon, title, and description. Supports 6 built-in icon names.

subtitle.description: Optional supporting text below the heading

features.type: Array<{ title: string; description: string; icon: string }>
features.description: Array of feature cards. icon must be one of: 'zap', 'shield', 'chart', 'users', 'globe', 'lock'. Unknown icon names fall back to 'zap'.

sections.notes: Grid is sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3. To add custom icons, extend the iconPaths record in the component frontmatter.

sections.name: Pricing
sections.description: Pricing tiers section with a responsive 3-column card grid. Supports highlighting one tier (visual emphasis with border-primary, shadow, and scale-105). Highlighted tiers get a filled primary CTA button; others get an outlined button. Price '/month' suffix is suppressed when price equals 'Custom'.

subtitle.description: Optional supporting text below the heading

tiers.type: Array<{ name: string; price: string; description: string; features: string[]; cta: { href: string; label: string }; highlighted?: boolean }>
tiers.description: Array of pricing tiers. Set highlighted: true on at most one tier to visually emphasize it. Price is a free-form string (e.g. '$29', 'Free', 'Custom').

sections.notes: Grid is lg:grid-cols-3. The '/month' suffix is only hidden when price === 'Custom' — use exactly that string for enterprise/contact tiers.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.description: Testimonial card grid section. Each card shows a blockquote, auto-generated avatar initials, author name, role, and company. No image support — avatars are initials-only.

testimonials.type: Array<{ quote: string; author: string; role: string; company: string }>
testimonials.description: Array of testimonial objects. Author initials are derived from the author name automatically.

sections.notes: Grid is md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3. Avatar is a muted circle with initials — no photo upload needed.

sections.name: CTA
sections.description: Call-to-action section with a rounded, muted card (bg-muted/50) containing a headline, description text, and a single primary CTA button. Centered layout.
sections.notes: No secondary CTA. If two buttons are needed, use a custom section or extend this component.

sections.name: ContentBlock
sections.description: Two-column content section with a text column (tagline, h2, description, optional feature bullet list) and an image placeholder column. The image side can be positioned left or right.

description.description: Body text rendered as a paragraph

tagline.description: Small uppercase label rendered above the heading in primary color

features.description: Optional list of feature bullet points rendered with checkmark SVG icons

imageSide.description: Controls which side the image placeholder column appears. 'left' uses lg:grid-flow-dense to reorder columns visually.

sections.notes: The image area is a placeholder (aspect-square bg-muted with an image SVG icon). Replace the placeholder div with an actual or element when customizing.

sections.name: LogoCloud
sections.description: Technology stack logo bar showing inline SVG logos for Astro, Tailwind CSS, React, TypeScript, shadcn/ui, and Claude Code. Hardcoded logos — not configurable via props. Accepts only a custom label text.

title.description: Label text displayed before the logo row

sections.notes: All 6 logos (Astro, Tailwind, React, TypeScript, shadcn/ui, Claude Code) are hardcoded inline SVGs — they cannot be swapped via props. Edit the component directly to change logos. Layout: flex-col on mobile, flex-row on lg.

sections.name: AIFeature
sections.description: Marketing section highlighting AI-friendly development. Left column: text about AGENTS.md standard and Claude Code Agent with external links. Right column: 2-column grid of 8 AI tool cards (OpenAI Codex, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Google Jules, Gemini CLI, Windsurf, VS Code, Claude Code). No props — fully self-contained.
sections.notes: No configurable props. Tool icons are loaded from /public/icons/ai-tools/{toolname}.svg with dark:invert. To customize, edit the tools array and icon paths directly in the component. Background is bg-muted/30.

sections.name: FAQ
sections.description: Accordion-style FAQ section using CSS-only <details>/<summary> elements with smooth height animation. Includes Schema.org FAQPage structured data (LD+JSON) for SEO rich results.
sections.notes: Uses name='faq' attribute on <details> for exclusive accordion behavior (only one open at a time). No JavaScript required. The + icon rotates to x when open.

sections.name: Stats
sections.description: Key metrics grid with large values, labels, and optional descriptions. Values are strings for flexible formatting (e.g. '10K+', '99.9%', '$0').

stats.type: Array<{ value: string; label: string; description?: string }>

sections.notes: Uses <dl>/<dd>/<dt> semantic markup. Grid is 2 cols on mobile, 4 on desktop with dividers. Has border-y for visual framing.

sections.name: Team
sections.description: Team member grid with avatar (image or auto-generated initials), name, role, optional bio, and social links (GitHub, LinkedIn, Twitter/X).

members.type: Array<{ name: string; role: string; bio?: string; image?: string; social?: { github?: string; linkedin?: string; twitter?: string } }>

sections.notes: Grid: 1 col mobile, 2 tablet, 3 desktop, 4 on xl. Cards have hover lift effect. Initials auto-derived from name when no image provided. Social icons are inline SVGs.

sections.name: Comparison
sections.description: Feature comparison table across multiple products/services. Supports boolean (checkmark/dash) and string values. One column can be highlighted.

features.description: Feature rows with one value per column

sections.notes: Semantic <table> with sticky first column on mobile scroll. Highlighted column gets bg-primary/8 tint and 'Recommended' badge. Alternating row stripes.

sections.name: Newsletter
sections.description: Email signup section with centered card layout containing headline, description, inline email form, and privacy note.
sections.notes: Form action='#' is a placeholder — connect to your own backend. Has bg-muted/30 background to stand out from adjacent sections. Includes 'No spam. Unsubscribe anytime.' privacy note.

sections.name: Contact
sections.description: Two-column contact section with info (email, phone, address) on the left and a 4-field form (name, email, subject, message) on the right.
sections.notes: Form action='#' — connect to your own backend. Required fields marked with red asterisk. Uses native HTML form elements (no React). Stacked on mobile, side-by-side on desktop.

ui.name: Button
ui.description: shadcn/ui Button component built with class-variance-authority (CVA) and Radix UI Slot. Supports asChild pattern for rendering as any element.

size.description: Size variant. icon = h-10 w-10 square.

asChild.description: When true, renders as the child element via Radix Slot instead of a <button>

ui.notes: Use client:load only when wrapping interactive React components. For static anchor links in .astro files, prefer native <a> tags styled with the same Tailwind classes used in section components.

ui.name: Card
ui.description: shadcn/ui Card compound component. Exports Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter sub-components.

className.description: Additional Tailwind classes merged via cn()

ui.notes: Base Card renders as a rounded-lg border bg-card shadow-sm div. All sub-components accept standard HTMLDivElement/heading attributes plus className.

ui.name: Badge
ui.description: shadcn/ui Badge component built with CVA. Pill-shaped label for status, tags, or categories.

className.description: Additional Tailwind classes merged via cn()

ui.notes: Renders as a <div> (not a <span>). Use className to override styles.

ui.name: Input
ui.description: shadcn/ui Input component. Styled text input with consistent focus ring, disabled states, and file input support.

type.description: HTML input type attribute (text, email, password, file, etc.)

className.description: Additional Tailwind classes merged via cn()

ui.notes: Passes all standard HTMLInputElement attributes through. Height is h-10. Full-width by default (w-full).

ui.name: Label
ui.description: shadcn/ui Label component built on Radix UI LabelPrimitive. Properly associates with form controls for accessibility.

className.description: Additional Tailwind classes merged via cn()

ui.notes: Use htmlFor to associate with an Input's id. Automatically styles as disabled when peer input is disabled (peer-disabled:opacity-70).

layouts.name: BaseLayout
layouts.description: Default layout for content-focused pages. Includes Header, Footer, SEO meta tags (OpenGraph + Twitter Cards), ClientRouter for view transitions, ThemeScript for dark mode persistence, and Vercel Analytics. Content is boxed (max-w-5xl via container).

title.description: Page title — appended with '| AstroDeck' automatically

description.description: Meta description for SEO and OpenGraph

type.description: OpenGraph type — use 'article' for blog posts

publishedTime.description: Article published time (only relevant when type='article')

author.description: Article author name (only relevant when type='article')

layouts.notes: Includes a visually hidden skip-to-content link for accessibility. Header and Footer are always rendered.

layouts.name: FullWidthLayout
layouts.description: Layout for showcase pages, portfolios, and galleries requiring full viewport width. Same structure as BaseLayout but without max-width constraint on main (w-full). Header and Footer use variant='fullWidth'. No Vercel Analytics.

title.description: Page title — appended with '| AstroDeck' automatically

description.description: Meta description for SEO and OpenGraph

layouts.notes: Does not include Vercel Analytics (unlike BaseLayout). Header and Footer receive variant='fullWidth'.

layouts.name: MinimalLayout
layouts.description: Bare layout with no Header or Footer. Full-viewport main area. Ideal for 404 pages, maintenance pages, and standalone landing pages that need complete layout control. Supports optional noindex.

title.description: Page title — appended with '| AstroDeck' automatically

description.description: Meta description for SEO and OpenGraph

noindex.description: When true, adds noindex meta tag to prevent search engine indexing

layouts.notes: No skip-to-content link, no Header, no Footer. main has id='main-content' and min-h-screen.

layouts.name: AuthLayout
layouts.description: Split-screen authentication layout. On desktop (lg+): left panel is a dark branding panel (bg-zinc-900) with Logo and a hardcoded testimonial quote; right panel contains the slot with centered form content (max-w sm:w-[350px]). On mobile: only the right panel is visible. Always sets noindex=true on SEO.

title.description: Page title — appended with '| AstroDeck' automatically

description.default: Sign in to your AstroDeck account

layouts.notes: noindex is always true — cannot be overridden via props. The left-panel testimonial quote and attribution are hardcoded in the component. The Logo component is auto-included. Slot content is constrained to sm:w-[350px] for form layout.

layouts.name: ArticleLayout
layouts.description: Blog article layout extending BaseLayout. Renders slot content inside a max-w-3xl article element with prose typography (Tailwind Typography plugin). Shows title as h1, and optionally renders publishDate and author below the heading.

title.description: Article title rendered as h1 and passed to BaseLayout

publishDate.description: Human-readable publish date string (also used as datetime attribute on <time>)

author.description: Author name displayed below the title

layouts.notes: Inherits all BaseLayout features including Vercel Analytics. Content is wrapped in prose prose-neutral dark:prose-invert — add standard HTML/Markdown; no extra styling needed.

pageTemplates.name: SaaS Landing Page
pageTemplates.description: Complete SaaS landing page combining hero, feature highlights, AI tooling showcase, social proof logos, content marketing blocks, pricing tiers, testimonials, and a conversion-focused CTA.

pageTemplates.name: Portfolio
pageTemplates.description: Personal or agency portfolio with hero, trust logos, alternating content blocks, social proof, and a CTA.

pageTemplates.name: Product Launch
pageTemplates.description: Focused launch page with hero, feature grid, a content deep-dive, and a closing CTA.

pageTemplates.name: Minimal Landing Page
pageTemplates.description: Stripped-down single-section landing page with no navigation. Useful for coming-soon pages or A/B test variants.

pageTemplates.name: Authentication Flow
pageTemplates.description: Login or signup page with split-screen branding panel and centered form. Use shadcn/ui Input, Label, and Button components inside the slot.

pageTemplates.name: Blog Article
pageTemplates.description: Reading-optimized article page with prose typography, publish date, and author attribution.
pageTemplates.example: See src/content/blog/ for content collection entries and src/pages/blog/[slug].astro for the route
